== Notes for [[Item:Q5482|Q5482]] ==

<p style="text-align: left;" dir="ltr"><a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Percomorpha">https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Percomorpha</a></p>
<p><p style="text-align: left;" dir="ltr">&nbsp;</p></p>
<p><div class="mw-heading mw-heading4" style="font-size: 16px; font-family: sans-serif; white-space: normal; word-spacing: 0px; text-transform: none; font-weight: bold; padding-bottom: 0px; font-style: normal; padding-top: 0.5em; orphans: 2; widows: 2; margin: 0.25em 0px; letter-spacing: normal; line-height: 1.6; background-color: #ffffff; text-indent: 0px; font-variant-ligatures: normal; font-variant-caps: normal; -webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; text-decoration-thickness: initial; text-decoration-style: initial; text-decoration-color: initial;"><span style="font-size: medium;"><span style="font-size: medium;"></span></span>
<p><h4 id="Internal_relationships" style="font-family: inherit; font-weight: bold; margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; display: inline; line-height: 1.6; font-stretch: inherit; font-optical-sizing: inherit; font-size-adjust: inherit; font-kerning: inherit; font-feature-settings: inherit; font-variation-settings: inherit; border: 0px; padding: 0px;">Internal relationships</h4>
<p><span style="font-size: medium;"><span class="mw-editsection" style="font-size: small; font-family: sans-serif; vertical-align: baseline; font-weight: normal; margin-left: 1em; line-height: 0; margin-right: 0px; user-select: none; margin-inline: 1em 0px;"><span class="mw-editsection-bracket" style="margin-right: 0.25em; margin-inline: 0px 0.25em;">[</span><a style="text-decoration: none; background: none transparent scroll repeat 0% 0%; white-space: nowrap; border-radius: 0px; overflow-wrap: break-word;" title="Edit section: Internal relationships" href="https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Percomorpha&amp;action=edit&amp;section=4"><span>edit</span></a><span class="mw-editsection-bracket" style="margin-left: 0.25em; margin-inline: 0.25em 0px;">]</span></span></span></div>
<p><p style="font-size: 16px; font-family: sans-serif; white-space: normal; word-spacing: 0px; text-transform: none; font-weight: 400; color: #202122; font-style: normal; orphans: 2; widows: 2; margin: 0.5em 0px 1em; letter-spacing: normal; background-color: #ffffff; text-indent: 0px; font-variant-ligatures: normal; font-variant-caps: normal; -webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; text-decoration-thickness: initial; text-decoration-style: initial; text-decoration-color: initial;">The following cladogram shows the<span>&nbsp;</span><a class="mw-redirect" style="text-decoration: none; background: none transparent scroll repeat 0% 0%; border-radius: 0px; overflow-wrap: break-word;" title="Phylogeny" href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Phylogeny">evolutionary relationships</a><span>&nbsp;</span>of the various groups of<span>&nbsp;</span><a class="mw-redirect" style="text-decoration: none; background: none transparent scroll repeat 0% 0%; border-radius: 0px; overflow-wrap: break-word;" title="Extant taxa" href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Extant_taxa">extant</a><span>&nbsp;</span>percomorph fishes:</p>
<p><p style="text-align: left;" dir="ltr"><br class="Apple-interchange-newline" />&nbsp;</p></p>

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
